# PostgreSQL 18 Documentation Map

Use this map to quickly choose which pages to fetch with fetch_webpage.

## Core Entry
- https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/index.html

## SQL and Data Modeling
- SQL language overview: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/sql.html
- SQL syntax: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/sql-syntax.html
- Data definition: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/ddl.html
- Data types: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/datatype.html
- Functions and operators: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/functions.html
- SQL commands reference: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/sql-commands.html

## Query Performance and Planning
- Performance tips: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/performance-tips.html
- EXPLAIN usage: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/using-explain.html
- Planner statistics: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/planner-stats.html
- Parallel query: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/parallel-query.html

## Indexing
- Indexes overview: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/indexes.html
- Index types: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/indexes-types.html
- Multicolumn indexes: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/indexes-multicolumn.html
- Partial indexes: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/indexes-partial.html
- Expression indexes: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/indexes-expressional.html

## Concurrency and Locks
- MVCC and concurrency: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/mvcc.html
- Transaction isolation: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/transaction-iso.html
- Explicit locking: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/explicit-locking.html
- Lock monitoring: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/monitoring-locks.html

## Security and Access Control
- Client authentication: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/client-authentication.html
- Role management: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/user-manag.html
- Privileges: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/ddl-priv.html
- Row security policies: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/ddl-rowsecurity.html

## Server Operation and Maintenance
- Server administration part: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/admin.html
- Runtime configuration: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/runtime-config.html
- Routine maintenance: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/maintenance.html
- Monitoring activity: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/monitoring.html
- WAL and reliability: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/wal.html

## Backup, Recovery, and High Availability
- Backup and restore: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/backup.html
- Continuous archiving and PITR: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/continuous-archiving.html
- High availability and replication: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/high-availability.html
- Logical replication: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/logical-replication.html

## Troubleshooting Aids
- Error codes appendix: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/errcodes-appendix.html
- Monitoring stats views: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/monitoring-stats.html
- System catalogs: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/catalogs.html
- System views: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/views.html
